metadata.description: SPADES Framework marketplace — the SPADES plugin for Claude Code.

plugins.name: spades
plugins.description: Scope, Plan, Approve, Do, Evaluate, Ship — six-phase loop with a Project layer and pluggable backends (Linear MCP, local filesystem, more). 16 skills and 5 agents (4 reviewer personas + 1 researcher). Pure Markdown, no bash, no external setup.
